vo_text: Born on July 16? Your card is the Queen of Clubs — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Nurturing Leader. You're the intellectual queen. You have wisdom, understanding, and the natural ability to mentor. The shadow side? You think you know what others need intellectually. You prescribe thinking instead of facilitating discovery. Your gift? Deep wisdom and thoughtful guidance. Plus ability to create intellectual safety for growth. You're learning to trust others' intellectual development. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

vo_phrases.text: and the natural ability to mentor.

title: Born July 16? Your Birth Card Is the Queen of Clubs #shorts
caption:
Born on July 16, your Cardology birth card is the Queen of Clubs.
A mirror, not a forecast. Find your own card free at cardblueprints.com.
